Pantheon.trading_pattern: Pantheon dominates early. Farm safely, use Q for damage.
Pantheon.ability_to_dodge: Pantheon Q (Spear) — dodge by stepping back.
Pantheon.early_game: Play extremely safe. Pantheon destroys early.
Pantheon.mid_game: Use E defensively. Scale with team.
Pantheon.win_condition: Survive early, scale to late game.
Pantheon.scaling: Yone outscales — your itemization is superior

Annie.trading_pattern: Annie has burst. Trade when stun down.
Annie.ability_to_dodge: Annie Q — dodge by moving away.
Annie.mid_game: Use E defensively. Scale with team.
Annie.win_condition: Survive early, scale to late game.
Annie.scaling: Yone outscales — your scaling is superior late

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder weak early. Spam Q and control lane.
Smolder.ability_to_dodge: Smolder Q — dodge by stepping back.
Smolder.early_game: Abuse early. Control lane with poke.
Smolder.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale.
Smolder.win_condition: Get early lead. Finish before he scales.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need major lead

Zed.trading_pattern: Both are mobile. Trade when abilities down.
Zed.ability_to_dodge: Zed W — back off when he clones.
Zed.mid_game: Use E for defense and engage. Teamfight.
Zed.win_condition: Win early trades. Scale to late game.
Zed.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Zed.positioning: Use E for damage and defense.
